<!--
PR checklist (see docs/CODING-STANDARDS.md → "Branch & PR workflow"):
- Branch is type/slug (feat/ fix/ docs/ chore/ ci/ refactor/)
- The docs that moved with the code are updated IN THIS PR:
  the relevant per-directory AGENTS.md + docs/FEATURE-MAP.md (and DECISIONS.md / USER-CORRECTIONS.md if a durable decision/correction applies)
-->

## What
<!-- What changed, concretely (files / behaviour). -->

## Why
<!-- The problem this solves. Link the issue. -->

## How
<!-- Approach and key decisions, so a reviewer gets the shape without reading every line. -->

## Testing
<!-- What was run and the result (test counts, lint, manual verification). "Not tested" only with a reason. -->

## Closes
<!-- One keyword line per issue so they auto-close on merge (a bare #NN does NOT auto-close). -->
Closes #
